violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Minimal splatter at microwave interior. -Residue/paper in bottom of bin storing blender pieces. -Residue at shelf for pitcher storage.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -Plastic ware is not stored inverted.

General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Employee did not wash hands before beginning preparation of coffee drink (after taking payment and have providing service at bowling counter. *Redirected immediately.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Containers of chopped tomatoes and onions were not date marked.--Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. -Container of food had make date of 12/4.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Yellow debris at interior ice drop/panel of ice machine.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Sleeves of coffee lids stored in crate on floor below coffee station drain line.
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Thermometers provided, used, clean, and accurate (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
